biological_replicate: Skin specimens adjacent to lesions (n = 3) were harvested from patients with diabetes mellitus requiring amputation.
technical_replicate: Ferrostatin-1 (Fer-1) was used to inhibit ferroptosis in diabetic rat wounds, and its effects on healing and expression levels were evaluated.
experimental_design: the wound closure rate in diabetic rats administered with Fer-1 was notably quicker compared with the untreated diabetic control group.
factor_value: the wound closure rate in diabetic rats administered with Fer-1 was notably quicker compared with the untreated diabetic control group.
number_of_fractions: No mention of fractionation in the text.
number_of_biological_replicates: 3 patients and 6 exudate samples from diabetic foot ulcers.
